name: Summarize Text
description: Summarize a block of text using Python.

name: LobeChat AI Agent
description: Modern AI chat framework with multi-modal support, function calling, and Chain of Thought reasoning. Supports Ollama integration with knowledge base and MCP marketplace.

name: CrewAI Multi-Agent Orchestrator
description: Multi-agent framework for collaborative AI workflows. Enables multiple Ollama models to work together on complex tasks with role-based specialization.

name: AutoGen Agent Swarm
description: Microsoft's multi-agent conversation framework enabling autonomous agent collaboration with Ollama models for complex problem solving.

name: LangChain Multi-Agent System
description: Advanced agent orchestration using LangChain with Ollama models. Supports tool use, memory, and hierarchical agent structures.

name: Semantic Kernel AI Planner
description: Microsoft's Semantic Kernel with planning capabilities for Ollama models. Creates and executes multi-step plans with skill orchestration.

name: Ollama Swarm Intelligence
description: Distributed intelligence system where multiple Ollama instances collaborate using consensus mechanisms and shared knowledge pools.

name: Agentic RAG System
description: Advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation with agentic capabilities. Multiple specialized agents handle different aspects of information retrieval and synthesis.

name: Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) Planner
description: AI planning system that decomposes complex tasks into hierarchical subtasks, distributing work across multiple Ollama agents.

name: Multi-Modal Fusion Agent
description: Combines text, image, and audio processing capabilities across multiple Ollama models with specialized fusion algorithms.

name: Adaptive Model Router
description: Intelligent routing system that dynamically selects the best Ollama model for specific tasks based on performance metrics and task characteristics.

name: Collaborative Reasoning Engine
description: Multi-agent system where different Ollama models contribute different reasoning perspectives, combining logical, creative, and analytical approaches.

name: Meta-Learning Coordinator
description: Coordinates multiple Ollama models in a meta-learning setup, where agents learn to learn and adapt their strategies based on task performance.
